claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is larger than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: Cheetah sprint is faster than Peregrine falcon dive.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h. Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h.

claims.statement: Great Wall of China length is longer than Lærdal Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Great Wall of China length: 21196 km. Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km.

claims.statement: There are more keys on a standard piano than grams in a kilogram.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 88 keys vs 1,000 g.

claims.statement: Wikipedia launched happened after World Wide Web proposed.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Wikipedia launched: 2001. World Wide Web proposed: 1989.
